title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How has technology changed the way people communicate?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two developments have changed communication the most.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how technology has changed the way people communicate.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two changes have had the biggest impact.
